title: SQL Injection in Core Banking API
description: Unsanitized input in /api/v2/transfer endpoint allows attackers to manipulate SQL queries, potentially exposing customer PII and transaction records.
remediation: Parameterize all SQL queries, deploy WAF rule PR-2024-SQL-01, patch to API v2.1.5
aws_mitigation: Enable AWS WAF managed rule group AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet

title: Unpatched OpenSSL in Payment Gateway
description: OpenSSL 3.0.7 vulnerability allowing potential man-in-the-middle during TLS handshake in payment processing Lambda functions.
remediation: Update OpenSSL layer to 3.1.4, rotate TLS certificates, enable AWS Certificate Manager monitoring
aws_mitigation: Update Lambda layer, enable GuardDuty TLS inspection

title: Excessive IAM Privileges — Dev Team
description: Development team IAM roles have production S3 read access and EC2 describe permissions, violating least-privilege principle.
remediation: Apply AWS IAM Access Analyzer recommendations, enforce permission boundaries, implement just-in-time access
aws_mitigation: AWS IAM Access Analyzer, AWS Organizations SCPs

title: Unencrypted Backup Files in S3
description: Nightly database backup exports stored without server-side encryption, exposing customer data in event of bucket compromise.
remediation: Enable SSE-KMS on all backup buckets, enforce encryption via S3 bucket policy, audit existing objects
aws_mitigation: AWS KMS, S3 bucket policies with aws:SecureTransport condition

title: Outdated TLS 1.0 on Legacy SWIFT Interface
description: SWIFT messaging interface accepts TLS 1.0 connections, violating SWIFT CSP requirements and PCI DSS 4.0 mandate for TLS 1.2+.
remediation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1, enforce TLS 1.2 minimum, coordinate with SWIFT support for protocol upgrade
aws_mitigation: N/A — on-prem; use AWS Direct Connect with TLS termination

title: Default Credentials on Network Firewall
description: Perimeter firewall management interface accessible with factory default credentials admin/admin from internal VLAN.
remediation: Credentials rotated, MFA enforced, management interface restricted to jump server CIDR only — RESOLVED 2024-10-02
